title: Community Ownership Fund: feasibility study report
body: "This report assesses the feasibility of using a mixed method case study approach to evaluate the impact, process and Value for Money of the Community Ownership Fund programme, delivered by the Ministry of Housing, Communities and Local Government.  This study builds on the proposed methods, which are described and discussed in full in the ‘methods paper’ produced by the evaluation team The Community Ownership Fund: evaluation method. "
